title: Inventor
current_task: A self-healing JSON config loader that detects corruption (truncated, trailing commas, missing quotes, unclosed brackets) and repairs it automatically using pattern matching and structural recovery, then validates against a schema before returning the config.

history: A novel interaction pattern between an AI assistant and a human collaborator that enhances creative thinking — something beyond simple Q&A, a new way for human and AI minds to interweave ideas in real-time.
a module that watches V's idle time and suggests the next build step

A module that monitors idle time (periods without user interaction or active task progress) and suggests the next logical build step based on project context, pending tasks, and system state. It should track what was being worked on last, what's in the project queue, and offer intelligent suggestions like "You were working on X, perhaps continue with Y?" or "No activity for Z minutes — here's an open task that could use attention."

A self-healing JSON config loader that detects corruption (truncated, trailing commas, missing quotes, unclosed brackets) and repairs it automatically using pattern matching and structural recovery, then validates against a schema before returning the config.
